title: Project ToTheMoon
description: A vanilla-styled technology and energy mod that aims to bring people To The Moon !
body: ## Welcome Welcome `To The Moon`. Yes, this is the biggest project of mine so far. Mod ID : `tothemoon` > Special Thanks to : LopyLuna - Texture Artist & @ZphenLogos on Twiiter for the mod illustration logo **This mod requires Forge 1.18.2 (version 40.1.0 or higher)** This is a simple mod that gives you a basic and vanilla-friendly experience in technology The mod is still in early age, and it needs a community to help me to fix and seek out some bugs and to polish the mod. ## Mod Infomation ### Main Features: - Workbench : a 5x5 crafting bench that helps you to craft all the machines (and components). - (TTM Exclusive) Nether Brick Furnace : a 3x3x3 multiblock structure that helps you to do some important smelting - Alloy Smelter, Metal Press, Energy Smelter / Generator, etc. **But this is the Project To The Moon, so where and how and when will we go To The Moon ?** Well, simple answer, this is mod is still in the most early stages of development, so the most basics things have been done. However, you can not go to the actual moon yet because it needs some polishing and improvement along with bug fixes and the community respond from every version. **PLEASE READ:** - This mod is only available on Modrinth and Curseforge. You have no permission to publish it outside either Modrinth or Curseforge (except mod packs with this mod) - The project is now licensed under GNU GPL v3.0 ## Project Donation
